evaluations.query: Clean up this AI-generated text: 'Certainly! I'd be happy to help optimize this query. It's worth noting that SQL queries can be improved in many ways. Generally speaking, adding indexes is a good approach. Please let me know if you need anything else!'
expected_behavior: Removes 'Certainly! I'd be happy to help' (slop pattern)

Preserves the core message about SQL optimization
